# Filesystem Tools Functionality Test
# Tests all filesystem tools with various file operations

# Build the filesystem server binary
go build -o mcp-filesystem-server .

# Create a temporary test directory with test files
mkdir test_dir
cd test_dir
echo "Hello, World!" > test_file.txt
echo "Line 1" > multiline.txt
echo "Line 2" >> multiline.txt
mkdir subdir

# Test all filesystem tools
exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_directory","arguments":{"path":"."}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"test_file.txt"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_file_info","arguments":{"path":"test_file.txt"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"new_file.txt","content":"New content"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"new_file.txt"}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_file_info","arguments":{"path":"subdir"}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_directory","arguments":{"path":"subdir"}},"id":9}
EOF

# Verify directory listing
stdout '"name":"test_file.txt"'
stdout '"type":"file"'
stdout '"name":"multiline.txt"'
stdout '"name":"subdir"'
stdout '"type":"directory"'

# Verify file reading
stdout 'Hello, World!'

# Verify file info
stdout '"name":"test_file.txt"'
stdout '"size"'
stdout '"modified"'
stdout '"permissions"'

# Verify file writing
stdout 'Successfully wrote.*bytes'

# Verify new file content
stdout 'New content'

# Verify directory info
stdout '"name":"subdir"'
stdout '"type":"directory"'

# Verify empty directory listing
stdout '\[\]'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_dir
